positive: A majestic, stylized geometric owl perched on a crescent moon, emitting glowing ethereal light. The owl's wings are composed of intricate, interlocking mandala patterns in deep sapphire blue, gold leaf, and cosmic indigo. Background features celestial nebulae and minimalist constellations, rendered with clean, sharp lines. Composition is centered and symmetrical, designed for high contrast and print visibility. Aesthetic: Art Nouveau meets cosmic gothic, using strong negative space. Color palette: Deep jewel tones, luminous gold, and celestial blues. High detail, vector illustration quality, perfect for screen printing.
